name: FLOWSERVE CORP
summary: Flowserve Corporation is a world-leading manufacturer and aftermarket service provider of comprehensive flow control systems, producing precision-engineered pumps, valves, seals, and automation equipment. The company serves global infrastructure industries including energy, chemical, power generation, and general industries (water management, pharmaceuticals). It also offers aftermarket services such as installation, advanced diagnostics, and turnkey maintenance through a global network of Quick Response Centers (QRCs).

products.name: Pumps
products.description: Precision-engineered pumps for movement and control of materials in critical industrial processes.

products.name: Valves
products.description: Flow control valves used across energy, chemical, power generation, and general industries.

products.name: Seals
products.description: Mechanical seals supporting flow control and protection in critical customer processes.

products.name: Automation
products.description: Automation equipment integrated into flow control systems for industrial applications.

products.name: RedRaven
products.description: Proprietary IIoT solution for equipment monitoring, remote asset management, and advanced diagnostics.

products.name: Flowserve Energy Advantage Program
products.description: Holistic flow control program helping operators reduce carbon emissions and lower total cost of ownership.

products.name: Aftermarket Services
products.description: Installation, advanced diagnostics, and turnkey maintenance programs delivered through global QRC network.
